ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the cookie */,
  "status" INTEGER /* HTTP status of the site */,
  "ncookies" INTEGER /* Number of cookies set */,
  "httponly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is HttpOnly */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the cookie is Secure */,
  "samesite" INTEGER /* SameSite attribute value */,
  "strict" INTEGER /* Strict SameSite attribute count */,
  "lax" INTEGER /* Lax SameSite attribute count */,
  "none" INTEGER /* None SameSite attribute count */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "cookie_value" TEXT /* Value of the cookie */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the cookie expires */,
  "path" TEXT /* Path for which the cookie is valid */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain for which the cookie is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "site_url" TEXT /* URL of the site */,
  "site_category" TEXT /* Category of the site (e.g., e-commerce, blog, news) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samesite_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SameSite attribute setting */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the SameSite attribute (e.g., Strict, Lax, None) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the SameSite attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the compliance check */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates if the site is compliant with cookie regulations */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last compliance audit */,
  "audit_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of audits (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance check (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_compliance_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie setting record */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the cookie settings */,
  "cookie_policy" TEXT /* The cookie policy description for the site */,
  "cookie_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the cookie (e.g., session, persistent) */,
  "cookie_type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., first-party, third-party) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_settings_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, data analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_reports_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the cookie associated with the analytics data */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data was collected */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_analytics_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "log_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the regulation takes effect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)
